caption:
3 TypeScript schema validators compared.

Zod, Valibot, and io-ts — which one should you pick for your next project?

Spoiler: one of them is 10x smaller than the others.

📌 SAVE this comparison.

Which one do you use? 👇

#typescript #zod #validation #webdev #coding #programming #developer #cleancode #schema #codingtips

slides.title: Schema validators compared
slides.subtitle: Zod vs Valibot vs io-ts — which one wins?

slides.title: Zod — the default choice
slides.desc: Most popular. Great DX. Chainable API. Works everywhere.

slides.title: Valibot — the lightweight contender
slides.desc: Tree-shakeable. 10x smaller than Zod. Same API style.

slides.title: io-ts — the FP approach
slides.desc: Functional programming style. Uses fp-ts. Powerful but verbose.
slides.punchline: Powerful. But you need to love fp-ts.

slides.teaser: Next: TypeScript infer — the pattern nobody teaches
